title: 明天的联防会议会有什么具体变化吗？
meta_description: 明天的联防会议会有什么具体变化吗？ - 路透的新闻：China to make 'substantial' COVID policy changes soon - ex-govt expert    [i]  A former Chinese senior disease c...
meta_keywords: 明天,联防,会议,具体,变化
contents:
路透的新闻：China to make 'substantial' COVID policy changes soon - ex-govt expert
     A former Chinese senior disease control official told a closed-door conference that substantial changes to the country's zero-COVID policy were set to take place in the next five to six months, according to a recording of the session heard by Reuters.
  所以明天就会有具体变化？会怎么变？还是和之前传闻一样会到明年3月的两会再作为新政府新政宣布？

discussions.content:
步骤如下：
一、开会。
二、全民打加强针疫苗。
三、宣布危害性下降到可忽略级别。
四、共存。
五、表扬。
@流羽年华:根本不可能。。。一定是加強防疫工作
@流羽年华:一定是坚持清零啊
